abilities.name: Hard to Wound +1
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer -.

abilities.name: Shambling
abilities.description: Gains Slow at start of each turn during Dramatic Time.

abilities.name: Zombie Curse
abilities.description: Any Living character killed by this character animates as Mindless Zombie one hour after death.

actions: (1) Gnashing Bite (Pugilism) | AV: 3 (7) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/3 damage. Increase AV by +1 for every other friendly character engaged with target.
system.notes: Weakest of all undead. Incapable of higher thought. Dangerous only in numbers but grow quickly. Death Marshals respond to every report seriously.
